positive: A vibrant, stylized botanical mandala featuring intertwined monstera leaves, tropical hibiscus blooms, and curling fern fronds. The artwork should utilize clean, strong black lines against a complementary pale teal and sage green background. Composition must be perfectly circular and highly symmetrical, designed for central placement on apparel. The style should be a combination of modern graphic illustration and elegant woodcut engraving, emphasizing crisp silhouettes and maximum contrast. Crisp linework, high detail, vector art aesthetic, flat color blocking, jungle flora, symmetrical pattern.
